jobs.title: Service-Showcasing Website Build
jobs.description:
I’m ready to put my company’s offerings online with a clean, modern business website whose core purpose is to showcase our services. The most important section will be a testimonials carousel or grid that lets visitors read genuine customer feedback right alongside each service description, so smooth integration of that feature is essential.  

I need the full design and development package: wire-framing, responsive UI/UX, development, and deployment to my domain. You’re free to work in WordPress, Webflow, or another mainstream CMS—as long as the final site is easy for me to edit without touch

jobs.title: Handwrite 200-Page PDF Notes - 24/03/2026 02:54 EDT
jobs.description:
I have a 200-page PDF that I need transcribed into clean, legible handwriting on A4 ruled paper (ruled on both sides). The style can be simple print or any easy-to-read mix—no elaborate calligraphy needed, just consistency and clarity.

Follow the original layout closely: keep headings and sub-headings distinct, use bullet points and numbered lists where they appear, and preserve all wording, punctuation, and line breaks so the handwritten version serves as an accurate study copy.

jobs.description:

I need an end-to-end solution: gathering carrier API documentation, defining a unified data model, building the integration layer, and wrapping it with a clean dashboard plus publicly documented REST endpoints. A minimal viable product should be deployable to a cloud environment of your choice and come with installation notes so I can reproduce the setup.

jobs.title: Cakes & Pastries Recipe Compilation
jobs.description:
I’m putting together a curated collection of dessert recipes and need help creating clear, kitchen-tested instructions focused exclusively on cakes and pastries.

Here’s what I’m after:
• 15–20 original recipes for cakes, cupcakes, tarts, or puff-pastry treats  
• Each recipe written in standard format: ingredient list (metric and US), step-by-step method, prep / bake times, and yield

• A short description (1–2 sentences) that captures the dessert’s appeal

jobs.description:
I need a crisp, modern logo that can be stitched directly onto home-decor pieces—mainly cushion covers and soft throws. The design should be simple enough to read well in thread at sizes as small as 3 cm, yet distinctive enough to anchor a whole collection.

Here’s what will help me choose the right partner: when you message me, drop in two or three examples of previous embroidery-ready logos you’ve produced. Seeing how your artwork translates from screen to stitch is far more useful to me than a long proposal.

jobs.title: Braille-Integrated Birthday Card Artwork
jobs.description:
We are commissioning an original front‑cover artwork for a greeting card that will feature the words “Happy Birthday” in both English and Braille.
The artwork should visually express the energy of Braille, inclusivity, diversity, and human connection, while integrating the required text in a clear, aesthetically balanced way.

Creative Requirements
- Original Artwork Only
- You may use AI for inspiration or enhancement, but the final artwork must be your own individual creation, not an AI‑generated image.
- Text Required on the Artwork
- The front cover must include:
- Happy Birthday (English)

jobs.title: Canva Same Day Offer in Polish
jobs.description:
I need a polished business-proposal presentation built in Canva and delivered before the end of today, 26 March 2026. All core text, figures, and talking points are ready on my side; you’ll simply shape them into a cohesive, client-facing deck that feels clean and professional.

Scope  
• 5–10 thoughtfully arranged slides  
• Professional Canva template of your choice (no pre-set brand palette to follow)  
• Consistent typography, balanced white space, and on-brand placeholder imagery where it adds value  
• Final files shared as both an editable Canva link and a PDF download

jobs.title: OTA Platform: Flights Cars Hotels
jobs.description:
I need a complete online travel agency platform that lets customers search, bundle and pay for flights, car rentals and hotel bookings in a single, streamlined cart. A secure user-login area is required so travellers can retrieve itineraries, modify dates and download invoices at any time.

Behind the scenes I want a robust back-office where I, my admins and call-centre or call centre staff can:

• Manage bookings in real time (issue, cancel, rebook, refund)  
• Generate operational and financial reports on demand  
• Control user and role permissions for admins, travel agents and customers
